texto: Science means constantly walking a tightrope between blind faith and curiosity; between expertise and creativity; between bias and openness; between experience and epiphany; between ambition and passion; and between arrogance and conviction - in short, between an old today and a new tomorrow.
explicacao: Citação de Heinrich Rohrer sobre temas ligados a tempo. “Science means constantly walking a tightrope between blind faith and curiosity; between expertise…” articula tempo, faith, creativity em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como creativity e today.
